역대상 24:1.content: These were the divisions of the sons of Aaron. The sons of Aaron: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

역대상 24:2.content: But Nadab and Abihu died before their father, and had no children: therefore Eleazar and Ithamar executed the priest’s office.

역대상 24:3.content: David with Zadok of the sons of Eleazar and Ahimelech of the sons of Ithamar, divided them according to their ordering in their service.

역대상 24:4.content: There were more chief men found of the sons of Eleazar than of the sons of Ithamar; and they were divided like this: of the sons of Eleazar there were sixteen, heads of fathers’ houses; and of the sons of Ithamar, according to their fathers’ houses, eight.

역대상 24:5.content: Thus they were divided impartially by drawing lots; for there were princes of the sanctuary, and princes of God, both of the sons of Eleazar, and of the sons of Ithamar.

역대상 24:6.content: Shemaiah the son of Nethanel the scribe, who was of the Levites, wrote them in the presence of the king, the princes, Zadok the priest, Ahimelech the son of Abiathar, and the heads of the fathers’ households of the priests and of the Levites; one fathers’ house being taken for Eleazar, and one taken for Ithamar.

역대상 24:7.content: Now the first lot came out to Jehoiarib, the second to Jedaiah,

역대상 24:8.content: the third to Harim, the fourth to Seorim,

역대상 24:9.content: the fifth to Malchijah, the sixth to Mijamin,

역대상 24:10.content: the seventh to Hakkoz, the eighth to Abijah,

역대상 24:11.content: the ninth to Jeshua, the tenth to Shecaniah,

역대상 24:12.content: the eleventh to Eliashib, the twelfth to Jakim,

역대상 24:13.content: the thirteenth to Huppah, the fourteenth to Jeshebeab,

역대상 24:14.content: the fifteenth to Bilgah, the sixteenth to Immer,

역대상 24:15.content: the seventeenth to Hezir, the eighteenth to Happizzez,

역대상 24:16.content: the nineteenth to Pethahiah, the twentieth to Jehezkel,

역대상 24:17.content: the twenty-first to Jachin, the twenty-second to Gamul,

역대상 24:18.content: the twenty-third to Delaiah, and the twenty-fourth to Maaziah.

역대상 24:19.content: This was their ordering in their service, to come into Yahweh’s house according to the ordinance given to them by Aaron their father, as Yahweh, the God of Israel, had commanded him.

역대상 24:20.content: Of the rest of the sons of Levi: of the sons of Amram, Shubael; of the sons of Shubael, Jehdeiah.

역대상 24:21.content: Of Rehabiah: of the sons of Rehabiah, Isshiah the chief.

역대상 24:22.content: Of the Izharites, Shelomoth; of the sons of Shelomoth, Jahath.

역대상 24:23.content: The sons of Hebron: Jeriah, Amariah the second, Jahaziel the third, and Jekameam the fourth.

역대상 24:24.content: The sons of Uzziel: Micah; of the sons of Micah, Shamir.

역대상 24:25.content: The brother of Micah: Isshiah; of the sons of Isshiah, Zechariah.

역대상 24:26.content: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. The son of Jaaziah: Beno.

역대상 24:27.content: The sons of Merari: of Jaaziah, Beno, Shoham, Zaccur, and Ibri.

역대상 24:28.content: Of Mahli: Eleazar, who had no sons.

역대상 24:29.content: Of Kish, the son of Kish: Jerahmeel.

역대상 24:30.content: The sons of Mushi: Mahli, Eder, and Jerimoth. These were the sons of the Levites after their fathers’ houses.

역대상 24:31.content: These likewise cast lots even as their brothers the sons of Aaron in the presence of David the king, Zadok, Ahimelech, and the heads of the fathers’ households of the priests and of the Levites; the fathers’ households of the chief even as those of his younger brother.
